actors.name: yard warden
actors.intent: closes to club anyone off the approved path
actors.weakness: slow to turn in a crowd or on broken ground
actors.counter: a valid compliance writ, a bribe, or luring it past a threshold it must not leave
actors.want: to keep the yard orderly and his ledger clean

actors.name: crossbow sentry
actors.intent: shoots from the wall at the first unpermitted movement
actors.counter: breaking line of sight, closing the distance fast, or smoke and glare
actors.want: to be relieved before the cold gets into his hands

actors.name: censor adept
actors.intent: draws a charter figure to bind or silence a caster
actors.weakness: the figure fails if its lines are broken
actors.counter: scuffing the drawn geometry, a fistful of iron filings, or separating them from their chalk
actors.want: to file this incident under a precedent that already exists

actors.name: intake sergeant
actors.intent: rallies the wardens around him and calls for more
actors.weakness: vain, and useless without an audience
actors.counter: forged orders, a bribe, or removing the soldiers he performs for
actors.want: a promotion out of this freezing intake gate

actors.name: censorate investigator
actors.intent: arrives after the fact and tallies your deeds into a warrant
actors.weakness: believes only what the records say
actors.counter: forgery, destroying the evidence, or a false schedule the Empire will act on instead
actors.want: a confession that matches the paperwork already filed

actors.name: imperial witchhunter
actors.intent: hunts the fugitive sorcerer by name and does not stop
actors.weakness: overcommits to the kill and ignores everything else
actors.counter: a body swap or false identity, leading them into an ambush, or making them chase a decoy
actors.want: to close the file on you personally
